articles.title: Synchronizing with EBA
articles.subtitle: How to reclaim the rite today?
articles.abstract: This article sheds light on the little-known fish deities and explores the temporality of EBA, also known as Hapi, their representations and worship. It emphasizes the operational dimension of Kamitic practices, offerings and celebrations, and their continuity in ancestral culture.

articles.title: Melanin and Selenium Benefits
articles.subtitle: Exploring the properties of melanin
articles.abstract: Exploration of melanin properties and its interaction with selenium. Discover the unrecognized benefits of these essential elements. The article explores the details related to melanin production mechanisms (melanogenesis) and their implications in essential vitamin and mineral needs for proper melanin function. It closes the debate on skin cancer in melanoderms (black people) and the dangers of excessive use of sunscreen, especially in young children.
